name: frame
description: Marketplace for the `frame` plugin — frame-space cognitive skills that help the user see, articulate, and reframe a problem before any approach is selected. Sibling to the `approach` marketplace; the two compose into the full problem→frame→approach→solution cascade. See plugin ARCHITECTURE.md.

plugins.name: frame
plugins.description: Frame-space skills — probe, problem-statement, jtbd, lens, scope, stakes, reframe, from-corpus, plus the composer meta-skill. Frame-only, never executes.
